name: ADHD in Latin America: Synthetic Dataset on Prevalence, Incidence and Case Numbers (GBD-based, 1990-2026)
description: Synthetic dataset providing estimates for ADHD prevalence, incidence, and total cases in 20 Latin American countries from 1990 to 2026, based on Global Burden of Disease methodology.

creator.name: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya

citation: De la Serna Tuya, J. M. (2026). ADHD in Latin America: Synthetic Dataset. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19145316
